title: Easter Eggs
description: Get decorative "Spawn Eggs" in survival by renaming Eggs!
body:
Love how the new Spawn Egg textures look but can't get them outside of Creative Mode? Get a **"Spawn Egg"** for any mob just by **renaming items with the anvil**! These can be used for **decorations**, **minigames**, **challenges**, or more, **all within survival**. ## Features: - **Chicken Eggs** can be named in the anvil to the name of any mob + " _Easter Egg_" (ex. "_Creeper Easter Egg_"). - Any type of Chicken Egg can be used for creating Easter Eggs (Normal, Blue, Brown, or one from one of my data packs). - Easter Eggs can be made for any mob variant added by my other packs (**Earth Animals**, **Clucking Ducks**, **Frog Concept Variants**)! Just make sure you have the relevant resource pack enabled **BELOW** Easter Eggs. - If using another resource pack, any Easter Eggs will use the textures from that pack! ### Mob names for Easter Eggs from my other packs: [**Earth Animals**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals) - _Muddy Pig_ - _Dried Muddy Pig_ - _Mottled Pig_ - _Pale Pig_ - _Piebald Pig_ - _Pink Footed Pig_ - _Sooty Pig_ - _Spotted Pig_ - _Moobloom_ - _Wooly Cow_ - _Moolip_ - _Albino Cow_ - _Ashen Cow_ - _Cream Cow_ - _Cookie Cow_ - _Dairy Cow_ - _Pinto Cow_ - _Sunset Cow_ - _Umbra Cow_ - _Cluckshroom_ - _Amber Chicken_ - _Bronzed Chicken_ - _Gold Crested Chicken_ - _Midnight Chicken_ - _Skewbald Chicken_ - _Stormy Chicken_ - _Fancy Chicken_ - _Skeleton Wolf_ - _Dyed Cat_ [**Clucking Ducks**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals) - _Duck_ [**Frog Concept Variants**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/frog-concept-variants) - _Red-Eyed Tree Frog_ - _Blue Frog_ - _Blue Frog B_ - _Blue Frog C_ - _Blue Frog D_ - _Blue Frog E_ ## ### MintRefresh:
